digest.greeting: Jean, today closed with several operational lanes still active, so this EOD keeps the carry-forward list focused and evidence-based. The clearest same-day outcomes are the Folder Path ticket resolution notice and Mar's DACA/I-90 status recap. Monday is an OOO day for you, with a few standing planning and portfolio blocks still visible on the dashboard and Outlook.

items.label: Folder Path ticket resolution shared
items.detail: Jean sent a same-day reply on the Ticket ID 0026345 thread saying the issue was solved, Halo ticket #26345 / Azure ticket #2116 was resolved, and Amir was able to test that the needed information can now be pulled.

items.label: DACA RNWL and I-90 RNWL status recap delivered
items.detail: Mar Garcia sent Jessica Richburg and Shelley Henry a same-day recap, copying Jean, that documented completed process review/mapping, I-90 RNWL E.CL deployment and SOP completion, and DACA RNWL E.CL UAT approval on June 5.

items.label: Review GitHub token alerts
items.detail: The morning dashboard flags an unread GitHub alert that a classic personal access token named token2 was added with admin:repo_hook and repo scopes, plus related token-warning emails from Thursday. Review, revoke, or confirm legitimacy before treating this as closed.

items.label: Confirm KPI final approval
items.detail: Still unchecked from today's carried-over dashboard items. Mid-Year Touchpoints launched in Rippling; confirm all KPIs are approved/finalized after the KPI Review with Sara.

items.label: Clarify Incident Response priority path
items.detail: The morning dashboard carries forward the Incident Response priority-path risk and says prior Teams context had no response yet from Cristian Garcia or Chelsea related to Jill's prioritization direction. Confirm leadership clarity and the next alignment path.

items.label: Check Supabase security warning
items.detail: Still unchecked from today's carried-over dashboard items. Review the Supabase critical table-publicly-accessible/RLS-disabled warning and decide whether the project is active and needs remediation.

items.label: Close CoE guide and priority follow-ups
items.detail: Today's dashboard carries forward TL review of the CoE Brief Guide and alignment of CoE priorities with Jorge's Portfolio Review Summary. Janet confirmed her team; verify remaining TLs and decide the CoE priority path.

items.label: Complete Nadia's affected-areas request
items.detail: Still unchecked from today's carried-over dashboard items. Complete Nadia Wilson's request on affected EPMO project areas, using the Salesforce Program Overview as supporting context.

items.label: Decide Co-counsel network go/no-go follow-up
items.detail: The morning dashboard included the reminder: Seguimiento a stakeholders de Co-counsel network project. Go/no-go? No dashboard completion was recorded for this reminder.

items.label: Submit recruiting feedback
items.detail: Today's dashboard carries forward Isaac Gomez Ventura interview feedback, and Outlook showed the Javier Hurtado Project Coordinator interview at 4:00 PM with a feedback link. Submit any feedback still outstanding.

items.label: Track DACA/I-90 remaining IT work after hold decision
items.detail: Mar's same-day recap says both processes are now on hold per Jill's direction, but I-90 RNWL/RPL ticket #0027951 and DACA RNWL New CL ticket #0027860 still have implementation issues or pending next UAT. Monitor confirmed completion dates and outcomes.

items.label: Follow up on Venn hardware recommendation for David
items.detail: David forwarded a same-day IT ticket update saying the current machine appears unable to run Venn properly and BCA recommends replacement with a newer company device. Follow up on next steps if this affects the Venn rollout or support path.

items.label: DACA RNWL and I-90 RNWL are on hold per Jill's direction
items.detail: Mar Garcia's same-day recap states that both DACA RNWL and I-90 RNWL are now on hold per Jill's direction; underway items will continue to completion, while remaining SOPs and trainings wait until the project resumes.

items.label: Jean - OOO
items.detail: Outlook shows Jean OOO for Monday, June 8. The morning dashboard also noted David, Santiago, and Mar OOO context for Monday.

items.label: Approve Timecards & Prepare for the Week
items.detail: Outlook shows the recurring Monday preparation block.

items.label: TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint
items.detail: The morning dashboard lists the recurring 15-minute touchpoint with Yuri Almeida.

items.label: 1:1 Shelley & Jean
items.detail: The morning dashboard lists the 1:1 with Shelley to understand department needs and how Jean can support Shelley.

items.label: EPMO Portfolio Review
items.detail: Outlook shows Sara's weekly portfolio review for reviewing new project requests and assigning next steps.

items.label: PMs Workshop
items.detail: The morning dashboard lists the PMs Workshop for capability improvement, areas for improvement, and wins.
